ogTitle: Southport Lagoon vs Spalford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Southport Lagoon and Spalford.
heading: Southport Lagoon vs Spalford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Southport Lagoon, Tasmania and Spalford, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Spalford has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Southport Lagoon (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Southport Lagoon or Spalford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Southport Lagoon has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Spalford scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Southport Lagoon scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Spalford scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Southport Lagoon or Spalford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Spalford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
